name: Hulst (Netherlands)
description: A yellow field charged with a black lion rampant with red tongue and claws (the Flemish lion).
history: Flag of the municipality of Hulst in Zeelandic Flanders, province of Zeeland; the Flemish lion reflects the region's historic ties to the County of Flanders.

features.role: a black lion rampant, langued and armed red (the Flemish lion)
